title: Cannot create Boards under newly created Workspace

posts.author: PatrickBaciuRewind (Patrick Baciu)
posts.cookedHtml:
We discovered that when a user grants our app access via Select Workspaces instead of All Workspaces we are able to create new Workspaces.

However, we are not subsequently able to create new Boards under these newly created Workspaces. We receive an error status code: UserUnauthorizedException.

image921×501 23.4 KB

Our app needs to be able to create Workspaces and Boards within those Workspaces. Are we missing something or is this how the Workspace permissions are meant to work?

Please let us know. We have some workarounds in mind that involve Customer Support, but would prefer to be able to create Boards in this scenario.

Thank you,
Patrick Baciu
